title: Zhuangzi, Chapter 15: Constrained in Will
description: Chapter 15 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.
introduction: Chapter 15 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.

translation.text: To live in the marshes alone, far from the world; to fish in solitary places; non-action and that is all — this is the life favored by the scholar of the rivers and seas, the man who withdraws from the world.
